title: Personal & Corporate Banking | MSME & Agri banking - IDBI Bank
content:
##### Advantage Savings Account Queries | IDBI Bank Advantage Savings Account FAQs
What is the minimum balance that I need to maintain in the Advantage Savings Account?
You need to maintain an Monthly Average Balance (MAB) of Rs. 10000 in the Advantage Savings Account for Metro & Urban Branches, Rs. 5000/- for semi urban Branches and Rs. 1000/- for Rural Branches.
What is the rate of interest applicable on the Advantage Savings Account?
Interest on Savings Bank Account is applicable as per Banks latest prevailing rate of Interest hosted on Banks website.
You will receive your account statement the month following every financial year quarter i.e. July, October, January and April.
Can I use any branch across India to operate my account?
Yes, you can access and operate your account from any branch of IDBI Bank across India. You can electronically transfer funds from one account to another account in any branch across cities. You can withdraw and deposit cash upto Rs. 50,000 per day at any branch.
Can I open a Demat Account with my Advantage Savings Account?
Yes, you can open Demat Accounts with your Advantage Savings Account.
Do I get, International Debit cum ATM Card, SMS Banking, Internet Banking, and Phone Banking?
Yes. These services have been introduced to make banking a convenient and a hassle-free option for you. The International Debit cum ATM Card has been packed with additional features to convert it to a virtual bank.
What is the withdrawal limit on my International Debit cum ATM Card?
You can withdraw upto Rs. 50,000 per day from your International Debit cum ATM card. You can also use your International Debit cum ATM card at other bank ATM.
What are the services that are available through ATMs, Internet Banking, Phone Banking, SMS Banking?
